Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class SocialProfileSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.SocialProfileSettings
public class SocialProfileSettings extends Metadata

Java class for SocialProfileSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SocialProfileSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableSocialProfiles" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isFacebookSocialProfilesDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isLinkedInSocialProfilesDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTwitterSocialProfilesDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isYouTubeSocialProfilesDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
